The '''PDT-8 Personnel Deployment Transport''' was a small unarmed utility [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] that was usually automated. The [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] craft ― categorized as a "[[mini rig]]" ― featured two open areas that could be used to transport people and cargo within or between installations, two large [[Engine/Legends|thrusters]] on its sides for propulsion, and a tripod mount to stabilize it on the ground.<ref name="CSWE" />

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] personnel and [[Droid/Legends|droids]], including [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[FX-7/Legends|FX-7]],<ref name="Kenner" /> and [[2-1B/Legends|2-1B]],<ref name="Archive">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=39673|text=PDT-8|work=The Star Wars Collectors Archive|archivedate=20080527030601}}</ref> utilized the craft on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Offscreen" />

==Behind the scenes==
The PDT-8 was part of [[Kenner Products|Kenner's]] [[Mini-Rigs]] line. It was discontinued after [[1982]].<ref name="Archive" /> Originally the '''PDT-8''' was conceived by Kenner as a transport for [[Droid/Legends|droids]].<ref name="Offscreen" /> It was first called the "DPT-8 Droid Personnel Transport", but the name was changed before the toy was released.<ref name="Archive" />
